resultList.dtldesc: Step into the epitome of modern living with this enticing opportunity  a meticulously crafted 2 BHK Builder Floor for sale in the coveted locale of Sector 2B Vasundhara, Ghaziabad. With its vaastu-compliant design and a desirable North-West facing orientation, this residence invites you to experience a harmonious blend of comfort and positive energy.Property Specifications This residence, occupying the first floor of a three-storeyed building, offers a generous carpet area of 65 sqm, providing a comfortable and versatile living space. As you step inside, you are greeted by a tastefully furnished interior, complete with lights and fans, creating an inviting ambience throughout. The two bedrooms are thoughtfully designed, with one featuring an attached bathroom and the other with access to a common bathroom. Both bathrooms are Western-style, and one is equipped with a geyser for added convenience.Enjoy the luxury of a private balcony attached to one of the bedrooms, providing a perfect spot for relaxation with a delightful view overlooking the road. The living-cum-dining area offers a flexible space for both entertainment and daily activities.The heart of this home, the modular kitchen, is equipped with essential amenities, including a chimney, cabinets, granite platform, and sink. A piped gas connection adds to the convenience of cooking. The flooring throughout is adorned with ceramic tiles, combining aesthetics with easy maintenance.Facilities Facilities on this builder floor enhance the overall living experience. With one open parking space available, 24-hour water supply, a security guard, and CCTV installations, your safety and comfort are prioritized. The presence of a lift adds to the convenience, ensuring easy access between floors.Locality Strategically located, this property is near Mewar College, Vasundhara, making it easily identifiable. Schools, hospitals, malls and supermarkets are within a 300-meter radius, catering to the educational, healthcare, and daily needs of the residents. Banks and ATMs are also conveniently located nearby.Public transport is easily accessible, contributing to the connectivity of the locality. For those relying on rail transport, Ghaziabad Station is approximately 6 km away, while the metro station is at a distance of 4 km.
